description: During a black screen transition, the narrator explains that Odysseus performed a ritual sacrifice at an entrance to the underworld to summon the spirits of the dead, specifically the blind prophet Tiresias. (objects: Ritual sacrifice; location: Entrance to the underworld) | A painting of Highland cattle is displayed while the narrator discusses the mythological warning from the blind prophet Tire
